testcase.name: test_defaults
testcase.failure:
self = <test_octodns_source_ddns.TestDdnsSource testMethod=test_defaults> mock = <MagicMock name='get' id='4399375968'>
@patch('requests_futures.sessions.FuturesSession.get') # Changed patch target def test_defaults(self, mock): a_value = '1.2.3.4' aaaa_value = '2001:db8:85a3::8a2e:370:7334' mock.side_effect = [MockResponse(a_value), MockResponse(aaaa_value)]
zone = Zone('example.com.', []) > DdnsSource('dynamic').populate(zone)
tests/test_octodns_source_ddns.py:34: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ octodns_ddns/__init__.py:70: in populate addr = self._get_addr(_type) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = DdnsSource, _type = 'A'
def _get_addr(self, _type): self.log.debug('_get_addr: type=%s', _type) try: future = self._sess.get(self.urls[_type]) > resp = future.result() # Get the actual response ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'MockResponse' object has no attribute 'result'
octodns_ddns/__init__.py:55: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_empty_response
testcase.failure:
self = <test_octodns_source_ddns.TestDdnsSource testMethod=test_empty_response> mock = <MagicMock name='get' id='4399378992'>
@patch('requests_futures.sessions.FuturesSession.get') # Changed patch target def test_empty_response(self, mock): mock.side_effect = [MockResponse(content=''), MockResponse(content='')] zone = Zone('example.com.', [])
> DdnsSource('dynamic').populate(zone)
tests/test_octodns_source_ddns.py:71: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ octodns_ddns/__init__.py:70: in populate addr = self._get_addr(_type) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = DdnsSource, _type = 'A'
def _get_addr(self, _type): self.log.debug('_get_addr: type=%s', _type) try: future = self._sess.get(self.urls[_type]) > resp = future.result() # Get the actual response ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'MockResponse' object has no attribute 'result'
octodns_ddns/__init__.py:55: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_error

failure.message: AssertionError: 'boom' != "'MockResponse' object has no attribute 'result'" - boom + 'MockResponse' object has no attribute 'result'

testcase.failure:
self = <test_octodns_source_ddns.TestDdnsSource testMethod=test_error> mock = <MagicMock name='get' id='4399381008'>
@patch('requests_futures.sessions.FuturesSession.get') # Changed patch target def test_error(self, mock): mock.side_effect = [MockResponse(raise_for_status='boom')] zone = Zone('example.com.', [])
with self.assertRaises(Exception) as ctx: DdnsSource('dynamic').populate(zone) > self.assertEqual('boom', str(ctx.exception)) E AssertionError: 'boom' != "'MockResponse' object has no attribute 'result'" E - boom E + 'MockResponse' object has no attribute 'result'
tests/test_octodns_source_ddns.py:53: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_types_a
testcase.failure:
self = <test_octodns_source_ddns.TestDdnsSource testMethod=test_types_a> mock = <MagicMock name='get' id='4399381344'>
@patch('requests_futures.sessions.FuturesSession.get') # Changed patch target def test_types_a(self, mock): a_value = '1.2.3.4' mock.side_effect = [MockResponse(a_value)]
zone = Zone('example.com.', []) > DdnsSource('dynamic', types=('A',)).populate(zone)
tests/test_octodns_source_ddns.py:80: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ octodns_ddns/__init__.py:70: in populate addr = self._get_addr(_type) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = DdnsSource, _type = 'A'
def _get_addr(self, _type): self.log.debug('_get_addr: type=%s', _type) try: future = self._sess.get(self.urls[_type]) > resp = future.result() # Get the actual response ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'MockResponse' object has no attribute 'result'
octodns_ddns/__init__.py:55: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_urls
testcase.failure:
self = <test_octodns_source_ddns.TestDdnsSource testMethod=test_urls> mock = <MagicMock name='get' id='4399381680'>
@patch('requests_futures.sessions.FuturesSession.get') # Changed patch target def test_urls(self, mock): a_value = '1.2.3.4' aaaa_value = '2001:db8:85a3::8a2e:370:7334' mock.side_effect = [MockResponse(a_value), MockResponse(aaaa_value)]
zone = Zone('example.com.', []) DdnsSource( 'dynamic', urls={'A': 'https://foo.bar/v4', 'AAAA': 'https://foo.bar/v6'}, > ).populate(zone) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_octodns_source_ddns.py:108: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ octodns_ddns/__init__.py:70: in populate addr = self._get_addr(_type) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = DdnsSource, _type = 'A'
def _get_addr(self, _type): self.log.debug('_get_addr: type=%s', _type) try: future = self._sess.get(self.urls[_type]) > resp = future.result() # Get the actual response ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'MockResponse' object has no attribute 'result'
octodns_ddns/__init__.py:55: AttributeError
